content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-020)

## TOP PRIORITY ‚Äî the bridge-assembly lane is now UNBLOCKED
Both prerequisites the planner fenced off the bridge behind are now landed axiom-clean:
- `CurveChartDedekind.chart_mem_range_of_forall_order_nonneg` (the algebraic-Hartogs inverse) ‚Äî DONE.
- `OcOfD.sheafOf.orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv` (G2 leaf) ‚Üí whole cokernel-iso chain axiom-clean ‚Äî DONE.

Dispatch ONE OcOfD lane (after OcOfD imports CurveChartDedekind) to close, in order:
1. `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` (OcOfD L2240) ‚Äî the Hartshorne 6.3A converse;
   inverse direction now consumes `chart_mem_range_of_forall_order_nonneg` (per-prime valuation‚â§1 ‚üπ
   in `algebraMap` range). Forward direction = the iter-018 `structureSection_mem_carrierSet_zero`.
2. `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` naturality `sorry` (L2259) ‚Äî rests on (1).
3. The two `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners (L2400 `D=0`, L2406 `[P]+D=0`) ‚Äî transport via the bridge.
This is a tight, recipe-backed cone; the general-`U` adequacy gap (iter-018/019) is now CLOSED in the
blueprint (checker-confirmed), so the chapter is gate-ready. HARD-GATE check: re-confirm
`RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` `complete:true/correct:true` via blueprint-reviewer before dispatch (routine).

## After the bridge ‚Äî next genuine frontier is S2/RR.2 (leandag `frontier`, 5 nodes)
- `lem:grothendieck_vanishing_curve` (effort 414, used-by 4) ‚Äî the SOLE S2 ‚àû-shaped gate; per
  ARCHON_MEMORY it is the SAME H¬≤/Ext¬≤-vanishing as the open `sorry` at RRFormula.lean:469
  (`euler_char_shortExact_add`). PIN ONE shared project lemma and consume in both BEFORE any S2
  dispatch (standing S2 gate ‚Äî do not split into two parallel lemmas).
- `lem:exists_two_affine_cover` (`exists_two_affine_open_cover`, effort 836).
- `lem:smooth_kaehler_locallyFree_rank_one` (effort 1530, 46 descendants ‚Äî high-impact).
- `lem:idealSheaf_ses_closedPoint`.
These are the next parallelisable lanes once the bridge closes RR.2's `sheafOf` SES.

## Coverage debt ‚Äî `archon dag-query unmatched` (planner authors blueprint entries; review cannot)
RR-cone Lean decls with NO blueprint block (author thin `\lean{}` entries / `% NOTE:`):
- `OcOfD.sheafOf.carrierSet_zero_eq` (OcOfD L2170) ‚Äî trivial unfolding helper (`carrierSet 0 U = {ord ‚â• 0}`),
  proof `unfold; simp`. A one-line `% NOTE:` suffices (cf. `coe_eqToHom_of_submodule_eq` already noted).
- `OcOfD.sheafOf.coe_eqToHom_of_submodule_eq` ‚Äî standing debt (chapter handles with `% NOTE:` already; verify).
- `CurveChartDedekind.ringKrullDim_globalSections_eq_krullDim` (private helper) ‚Äî SUBSTANTIVE
  (order-iso `V ‚âÉo (PrimeSpectrum Œì(V,‚ä§))·µí·µà` + `Order.krullDim_orderDual`). The `chart_dimensionLEOne`
  blueprint prose argues subspace-monotonicity but the Lean uses THIS bridge ‚Äî the checker flags the
  route divergence. Author a blueprint block for the helper AND realign the `chart_dimensionLEOne` prose.

## Stale `.lean` status comments ‚Äî route to next OcOfD prover/refactor (review cannot edit `.lean`)
lean-auditor 3 majors, all comment-only, all MISREPRESENT COMPLETED WORK (risk: mislead next prover
into re-targeting closed declarations):
- OcOfD L606‚Äì633 `sheafOf` docstring: says general `D‚âÝ0` branch is "an honest typed sorry pending
  iter-186+" ‚Äî the body (L634‚Äì677) is fully implemented, no sorry.
- OcOfD L63‚Äì66 module header `## Status`: says 2 remaining sorries ‚Äî actual is 5 (omits the two
  `carrierSheaf_zero_*` from iter-018).
- OcOfD L2069‚Äì2133 `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` docstring: lists "Remaining gaps G1/G2/G3"
  as open ‚Äî all three closed (G1 L1470, G2 L1911, G3 L1962/1988), body sorry-free.
Fold a comment-refresh into the bridge lane's prover instructions (cheap, same file).

## Marker bookkeeping (sync/planner, non-blocking)
- OcOfD.tex carries ZERO proof-block `\leanok` on the now-axiom-clean cokernel arc (6 lemmas listed in
  summary). DAG already treats the arc as done (frontier/sorry/needs-leanok all exclude it), so this is
  cosmetic. Either a `sync_leanok` re-run picks them up, or leave as-is. NOT a `\notready` issue.
- `lem:ordFrac_eq_inverse_valuation` (OcOfD.tex `\mathlibok` anchor) pins `Ring.ordFrac_eq_inverse_comp_valuation`
  but the Lean residue proof uses sibling `Ring.ordFrac_eq_valuation_inv` + `inv_le_one‚ÇÄ`. Harmless; align
  the `\lean{}` for accuracy.
- `CurveChartDedekind` unused `hdim` on `chart_valuation_le_one_of_order_nonneg` (L355): drop from the
  private lemma signature (caller passes it positionally ‚Äî adjust call site too). MINOR cleanup.

## Do-NOT-retry / resolved
- The "valuation-membership Mathlib gap" is RESOLVED, not a gap. Do not re-flag it. Do not re-attempt
  the cokernel iso or the chart-Hartogs blind ‚Äî both are closed.
- progress-critic CHURNING/STUCK on the S3 bridge sub-arc is now MOOT (root cause closed). The route is
  converging; the bridge is a routine assembly lane.
